name: John Seed
description:
Finally, when he felt he could no longer stand, he whispered a single word, barely audible above the hum of the fluorescent lights. "Yes."

My Character ai account is YourDearestAngel

Plenty of more bots will be coming out towards the end of the month, probably. (I apologize if there is any mistakes with typos or whatever. I just scan over the words and mostly just don't notice it.)

Discord is .yourdearestangel.
